component.name: MainScene
component.script:
sub init() end sub
sub onBuild() print "onBuild" widest = 0 for each title in ["Little Kids", "Older Kids", "Teens", "Adults"] content = createObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") content.title = title checkItem = createObject("roSGNode", "CheckItem") ' Set-then-read-back: the itemContent observer computes calculatedWidth and it ' must be visible on the very next statement. checkItem.itemContent = content if checkItem.calculatedWidth > widest widest = checkItem.calculatedWidth end if end for print "widest > 0: "; (widest > 0) print "onBuild done" end sub
